title: 最近 30 天商品 GMV Top 5
sql: SELECT p.product_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS gmv FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status = 'paid' AND o.order_date >= date((SELECT MAX(order_date) FROM orders), '-30 day') GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 5
notes: Use paid orders only and transaction-time unit_price for GMV.

title: 最近 6 个月订单量和客单价
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS order_count, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.id), 2) AS aov FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'paid' AND o.order_date >= date((SELECT MAX(order_date) FROM orders), '-6 month') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
notes: AOV divides paid GMV by distinct paid orders.

title: 品类 GMV 排名
sql: SELECT c.category_name, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS gmv FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE o.status = 'paid' GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 10
notes: Join products to categories before grouping.
